texto: The enchantments of the past must always become the disenchantments of the future. But memory, a preservative, may intervene. The embalmer of original enchantments, it is the only human faculty that can outwit the advance of chronological time. Art, the embalmer of memory, is the only human vocation in which the time regained by memory can be permanently fixed.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Howard Moss sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “The enchantments of the past must always become the disenchantments of the future. But memory, a …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, art, memory, útil em momentos de memory e proust.
